description.p: EasyKiConverter is a modern C++ desktop tool based on Qt 6 and MVVM architecture, designed for electronic engineers to efficiently convert LCSC and EasyEDA component data to KiCad library files.
EasyKiConverter 是一个基于 Qt 6 和 MVVM 架构的现代化 C++ 桌面工具， 专为电子工程师设计，旨在高效地将嘉立创（LCSC）和 EasyEDA 的元件数据转换为 KiCad 库文件。

ul.li: Full pipeline conversion: symbols (.kicad_sym), footprints (.kicad_mod), and 3D models (STEP/WRL)
Split symbol support
Efficient batch processing with multi-threading and BOM file import
Modern Qt Quick UI with dark/light theme support
Automatic LCSC component preview images and datasheet extraction
全流程转换：符号（.kicad_sym）、封装（.kicad_mod）和 3D 模型（STEP/WRL）
分体式符号支持
高效批量处理，支持多线程和 BOM 文件导入
基于 Qt Quick 的现代化 UI，支持深色/浅色主题
自动获取 LCSC 元件预览图和数据手册

screenshot.caption: Main application window with component conversion interface
主应用窗口 - 元件转换界面

ul.li: Add symbol library description and keyword export for KiCad library files
为 KiCad 库文件添加符号库描述和关键词导出
Add component description editing dialog for customizing export descriptions
添加元器件描述编辑对话框，支持自定义导出描述
Add STEP model Z-axis offset alignment to match WRL model pad positioning in KiCad
添加 STEP 模型 Z 轴偏移对齐，确保在 KiCad 中与 WRL 模型焊盘位置一致
Add CLI --3d-model-format option to select 3D model export format (wrl/step/both)
添加 CLI --3d-model-format 选项，支持选择 3D 模型导出格式（wrl/step/both）
Add CLI --lib-name option to customize exported library name
添加 CLI --lib-name 选项，支持自定义导出库名称
Add retry mode for export to preserve existing library content and only update failed components
为导出功能添加重试模式，保留已有库内容并仅更新失败的组件
Fix STEP/WRL 3D model offset misalignment causing models to land at different pad positions in KiCad
修复 STEP/WRL 3D 模型偏移不一致导致在 KiCad 中模型落在不同焊盘位置的问题
Fix stale fetchingComponent entry causing validation requests to be silently skipped in ComponentService
修复 ComponentService 中陈旧的 fetchingComponent 条目导致验证请求被静默跳过的问题
Fix 3D model cache using corrupted empty files as valid cache hits
修复 3D 模型缓存将损坏的空文件误判为有效缓存的问题
Fix STEP export logic to use cache-first strategy instead of network-first
修复 STEP 导出逻辑，从"先网络后缓存"改为"先缓存后网络"策略
Fix export error handling to properly clear stale component state on fetch failures
修复导出错误处理，在获取失败时正确清除陈旧组件状态
Fix async request cancellation thread safety in NetworkClient
修复 NetworkClient 中异步请求取消的线程安全问题
Fix footprint library export to preserve existing footprints when not in overwrite mode
修复封装库导出在非覆盖模式下保留已有封装的问题
Optimize STEP geometry parsing with single-pass CARTESIAN_POINT collection and VERTEX_POINT lookup
优化 STEP 几何解析，采用单次遍历收集 CARTESIAN_POINT 并通过 VERTEX_POINT 查找
Unify 3D model coordinate units to millimeters and extract WRL_UNIT_TO_MM constant
统一 3D 模型坐标单位为毫米并提取 WRL_UNIT_TO_MM 常量
Preload OBJ binary data during cache loading to avoid repeated disk I/O in export stage
在缓存加载阶段预加载 OBJ 二进制数据，避免导出阶段重复磁盘 I/O
WRL files are regenerated from OBJ when available instead of using stale cached WRL
有 OBJ 数据时始终重新生成 WRL 文件，避免使用过期的缓存 WRL
Improve NetworkClient with cancelAllRequests() API and proper thread-safe request lifecycle
改进 NetworkClient，添加 cancelAllRequests() API 并完善线程安全的请求生命周期管理
Add global alpha buffer configuration for transparent window rendering
添加全局透明通道(alpha buffer)配置以支持透明窗口渲染
Optimize Windows platform rendering backend to Direct3D 11
将 Windows 平台渲染后端优化为 Direct3D 11
Implement window background rendering using Canvas instead of MultiEffect
使用 Canvas 替代 MultiEffect 实现窗口背景渲染
Add unit tests for CadDataLoader and ComponentListViewModel
添加 CadDataLoader 和 ComponentListViewModel 的单元测试
Add support for multiple graphics APIs including OpenVG, Null, and Direct3D12
增加对多种图形API的支持，包括OpenVG、Null和Direct3D12
Prefer Vulkan rendering backend and add rendering API detection
优先使用Vulkan渲染后端并添加渲染API检测
Improve debug data export with atomic writes
使用原子写入改进调试数据导出功能
Add debug data export functionality
添加debug数据导出功能
Support multi-platform Qt path configuration and build options
支持多平台Qt路径配置和构建选项
Add component request cancellation and fix API business layer error handling
添加元器件请求取消功能并修复API业务层错误处理
Unify QML component styles using AppStyle
使用AppStyle统一QML组件样式
Remove Docker environment build workflow
移除Docker环境构建工作流
Update EasyKiConverter documentation
更新 EasyKiConverter 文档
